LOGIN.TITLE: The virtual board that connects residents and services
LOGIN.SUBTITLE: Discover products and local services available inside your condominium. A simple way to connect who offers with who needs.
LOGIN.FEATURE_1: Haircuts, sweets, maintenance, pets and more
LOGIN.FEATURE_3: More convenience for people living in the condo
LOGIN.EXAMPLE_TEXT: One resident cuts hair, another sells sweets, another offers maintenance. With the board, everyone becomes visible to neighbors and closes more deals.
LOGIN.SIGN_IN_SUBTITLE: Access your account and see what is available in your condo.
LOGIN.CREATE_ACCOUNT_LINK: Do not have an account? Create one

REGISTER.TITLE: Create account
REGISTER.SUBTITLE_CREATE: Register your account to access your condominium board.
REGISTER.SUBTITLE_CONFIRM: Enter the code sent to your email.
REGISTER.ACCOUNT_CREATED: Account created. Check your email for the confirmation code.
REGISTER.EMAIL_CONFIRMED: Email confirmed. You can now log in.

DASHBOARD.TITLE: Welcome to your workspace
DASHBOARD.SUBTITLE: Your assets and global style system are now active across the application.
